title: Computer Networking
description: A fully functional TCP/IP banking application â€” the standout hands-on implementation in the collection. A multi-threaded Python server listens on port 1025, managing a shared account balance while concurrently handling DEPOSIT, WITHDRAW, and BALANCE commands from multiple clients. A menu-driven Python client connects over a raw socket stream, sending binary-formatted requests and reading real-time responses.
shortDescription: Multi-threaded Python TCP banking server and client â€” fully working socket programming implementation.
